chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-210 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 28-08-2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate along with both petitioners. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant P.G a/w SIP Muhammad Yakoob of P.S, B-section, Tando Adam and SIP Bux Ali Wagan of P.S, Tando Adam City-Sanghar. **** Mr. Hidayatullah S. Balouch, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents No.10&13, who are also present. Learned Law Officers file statements on behalf of official respondents No.2,5&6, which are taken on record and copies whereof are provided to learned counsel for the petitioners. Petitioner No.1 Mst. Murk is present and states that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Gul Mir (petitioner No.2) without any pressure, compulsion and coercion, which has caused very much annoyed to her family members who are issuing threats for dire consequences. She further states that she has not been abducted or enticed away by anyone including the petitioner No.2; however, petitioners apprehend that petitioner No.2 and his family members will be booked in malicious false criminal cases at the hands of private respondents. Learned Law Officers submit that official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. At this juncture, learned counsel for private respondents submits that private respondents have come from Sanghar and they have apprehension of harassment from the side of petitioner No.2’s

Learned Law Officers submit that official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. At this juncture, learned counsel for private respondents submits that private respondents have come from Sanghar and they have apprehension of harassment from the side of petitioner No.2’s 2 party. Accordingly, the police officials present in Court are directed to provide protection to the private respondents in accordance with law. After such statement, learned counsel for petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to both the petitioners, as and when they needed. JUDGE Ahmad
